title: Afterlight (Deep Glitch Bounce Mix)
caption: I was inspired to make this by my son
about: My son wanted me to try and make some stutter house. I was currently on a kick to do songs with interesting words in the hooks even made up ones. The result is this song.
lyrics:
[Instrumental 2 bars]

[VERSE 1]
After a flash
After lightning turns sand to glass
After the sun
Until the moon 
Every time I close my eyes
And still see you…
(you, you, you, you, you)

[CHORUS 1]
After-after-afterlight... light-light-light
After-after-afterlight... light-light-light
Where we were... we-we-were... 
Where we might... mi-mi-might
After-after-afterlight

[VERSE 2]
After stars shine
After supernovas turn suns to life
Beyond sunset
Before midnight
Every time I close my eyes
And still see you…
(you, you, you, you, you)

[CHORUS 2]
After-after-afterlight... light-light-light
After-after-afterlight... light-light-light
Where we were... we-we-were...
Where we might... mi-mi-might
After-after-afterlight

[Instrumental 2 bars]

 [Outro]
Every time I close my eyes
And still see you…
(you, you, you, you, you)
Not morning
Not night
Just... after-after-afterlight
Where we were... we-we-were
Where we might... mi-mi-might

[Instrumental 4 bars]

[Fade]
After-after-afterlight... light-light-light
After-after-afterlight... light-light-light
Where we were... we-we-were... where we might... mi-mi-might
After-after-afterlight
